brp-refactor: split this component into hooks and types
refactor this TSX into multiple files
brp-fix: fix this bug with minimal diff
reproduce and patch this failing behavior
brp-debug: isolate the root cause of this performance issue
brp-plan: make a decision complete implementation plan
scope this feature with milestones and acceptance criteria
brp-review: review this change for regressions and missing tests
perform a findings first code review before delivery
brp-test: add unit and integration tests for this change
validate this implementation with deterministic tests
